scripts.dev: pnpm sync-env && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:client:wait"
scripts.build: pnpm sync-env && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm sync-env && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm sync-env && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/shared lint && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/server lint && pnpm --filter @ai-novel/client lint
